testcase.name: test_chat

failure.message:
assert 'reply' in {'ghost_message': {'content': "Hey Robert. 

What's on your mind?", 'engine': 'ID', 'id': '57912377-44f8-48e5-8f0c-18e18a85bd64', 'latency_ms': 1388, ...}, 'session_id': 'swarm-regression', 'user_message': {'content': 'hello', 'engine': 'ID', 'id': 'd19b6a9a-3270-47b4-9a5c-a94920bcc7b0', 'latency_ms': None, ...}}
 +  where {'ghost_message': {'content': "Hey Robert. 

What's on your mind?", 'engine': 'ID', 'id': '57912377-44f8-48e5-8f0c-18e18a85bd64', 'latency_ms': 1388, ...}, 'session_id': 'swarm-regression', 'user_message': {'content': 'hello', 'engine': 'ID', 'id': 'd19b6a9a-3270-47b4-9a5c-a94920bcc7b0', 'latency_ms': None, ...}} = json()
 +    where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure:
tests/test_swarm.py:284: in test_chat assert "reply" in r.json() E assert 'reply' in {'ghost_message': {'content': "Hey Robert. 

What's on your mind?", 'engine': 'ID', 'id': '57912377-44f8-48e5-8f0c-18e18a85bd64', 'latency_ms': 1388, ...}, 'session_id': 'swarm-regression', 'user_message': {'content': 'hello', 'engine': 'ID', 'id': 'd19b6a9a-3270-47b4-9a5c-a94920bcc7b0', 'latency_ms': None, ...}} E + where {'ghost_message': {'content': "Hey Robert. 

What's on your mind?", 'engine': 'ID', 'id': '57912377-44f8-48e5-8f0c-18e18a85bd64', 'latency_ms': 1388, ...}, 'session_id': 'swarm-regression', 'user_message': {'content': 'hello', 'engine': 'ID', 'id': 'd19b6a9a-3270-47b4-9a5c-a94920bcc7b0', 'latency_ms': None, ...}} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
